'''Singular Nak''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bothan/Legends|Bothan]] who was found in the [[Trade Outpost|Dathomir Trade Outpost]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
Nak once attempted to buy an ancient [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] from [[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsister]] [[Gruthashaal]] but upon her refusal he hired an individual to [[Death/Legends|kill]] her and steal the lightsaber. He lied to this individual, telling them that she had in fact stole the lightsaber from him. Once the individual had killed her and brought the lightsaber back to him, he told them the truth.

==Behind the scenes==
Singular Nak was a non-player character in the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]], prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].
